'''√l-s-h''' ('''kalasah''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:deafferentate|deafferentate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-s-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:deafferentate|deafferentate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √l-s-h
|-
! Lemma
| kalasah
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thilasah || jilasah || shilasah || kilasah
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthulasah || jujulasah || shushulasah || kukulasah
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thulasah || julasah || shulasah || kulasah
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thulasah || julasah || shulasah || kulasah
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thelasah || jelasah || shelasah || kelasah
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thotholasah || jojolasah || shosholasah || kokolasah
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || tholasah || jolasah || sholasah || kolasah
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || tholasah || jolasah || sholasah || kolasah
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || lasah || lasah || lasah || lasah
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || lasah || lasah || lasah || lasah
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || lasah || lasah || lasah || lasah
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || lasah || lasah || lasah || lasah
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thælasah || jælasah || shælasah || kælasah
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathalasah || jajalasah || shashalasah || kakalasah
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thalasah || jalasah || shalasah || kalasah
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thalasah || jalasah || shalasah || kalasah
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shalasah
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshalasah
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishalasah
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shalasahnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshalasahnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishalasahnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shalasahshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshalasahnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishalasahshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shalasahro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshalasahnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishalasahro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shalasahmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshalasahnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishalasahmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shalasahsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshalasahnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishalasahsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shalasahng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshalasahnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishalasahng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shalasahya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshalasahnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishalasahya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shalasahyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshalasahnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishalasahyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shalasahnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshalasahnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishalasahnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shalasahnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshalasahnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishalasahnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shalasahnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshalasahnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishalasahnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shalasahshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshalasahnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishalasahshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shalasahshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshalasahnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishalasahshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shalasahshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshalasahnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishalasahshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shalasahronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshalasahnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishalasahronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shalasahroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshalasahnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishalasahroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shalasahromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshalasahnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishalasahromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shalasahmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshalasahnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishalasahmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shalasahmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshalasahnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishalasahmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shalasahmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshalasahnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishalasahmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
